privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to synthetically create a countersunk hex bolt. The theoretical total volume of the part described in the prompt is calculated mathematically as 2297.39 mm^3 (2379.23 mm^3 for the revolved solid, minus 81.84 mm^3 for the 3.5mm deep hex cut). The minimum and maximum volume metadata constraints (2100.0 and 2450.0) safely bound this expected theoretical volume, accounting for volume loss due to coarse STL tessellation. The bounding box dimensions are correctly calculated to be 36.0mm in length and 16.0mm in maximum width based on the specified half-profile coordinates.
